analysis.reasoning: Core message: Congratulates Albania’s High Court judges for holding a general meeting with social distancing; states the US continues to strongly support Albania’s justice reform as necessary for EU membership. Evaluation: US1 (honorable tradition) – Not invoked; no reference to American historical values or legacy. US2 (admirable society) – Not applicable; no mention of US society, groups, or heroes. US3 (hostile enemies) – No adversary framed. US4 (force for good) – Yes; the US is portrayed as supporting justice reform, tied to human rights/rule-of-law and EU integration, indicating benevolent support. US5 (great international ally) – Yes; it emphasizes unwavering US support to an ally (Albania) and praises their progress. US6 (at the forefront) – Not applicable; no claim of US leadership in domains like economy/technology.
